agentNotes.note: Injects CLAUDE.md as an advisory user message (no compliance guarantee); official size target is under 200 lines — this file is 905. Zero-exception rules belong in hooks.
Truncates at 32 KiB — this file is 122.1 KiB, everything past the cap is silently dropped.
Reads AGENTS.md natively. Path-scoped rules need .cursor/rules/*.mdc — plain .md files there are silently ignored.
